name: Nan Yang Dyeing & Finishing Co.,Ltd
summary: Nan Yang Dyeing & Finishing Co.,Ltd engages in dyeing, printing, finishing, knitting, processing, and selling fabrics. The company offers cotton, rayon, and chemical fiber knitted fabrics. It also operates as a professional communication semiconductor component packaging and testing foundry. The company was founded in 1964 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
